mapper.insert:
insert into cc_outcall_queue (instance_id, env_id, queue_code, caller, callee, queue_status, task_code, group_code, acid, call_count, call_start_time, call_end_time, ext_info, creator, gmt_create, modifier, gmt_modified) values
(#{item.instanceId}, #{item.envId}, #{item.queueCode}, #{item.caller}, #{item.callee}, #{item.queueStatus}, #{item.taskCode}, #{item.groupCode}, #{item.acid}, #{item.callCount}, #{item.callStartTime}, #{item.callEndTime}, #{item.extInfo}, #{item.creator}, #{item.gmtCreate}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.gmtModified})
